description: Sensors and cameras on a highway detect a vehicle traveling in the wrong direction. An operator must take immediate action.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Wrong-Way Driver' alert from the highway monitoring system, including video evidence.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent acknowledges the critical safety alert.

nodes.task_description: Immediately activate all dynamic message signs on the highway to warn oncoming traffic.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent posts a warning message on the signs.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch all available state police units to intercept the vehicle.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent dispatches law enforcement with the vehicle's last known location and direction.
